title: Housekeeping genes expression in human striated muscle in resting and effort conditions
author: Gilmara de Assis
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
The figures report the results of PCR analyses of mRNA expression of 14 housekeeping genes from Vastus Lateralis tissue of 3 athletic subjects (1 female) in both resting and post- maximum effort BRUCE protocol for the treadmill:  
[light-PINK] - Female, rest 

 [dark-PINK] - Female, effort 

 [light-BLUE] - Male, rest 

 [dark-BLUE] - Male, effort 

 Genes: 

 ACTB, B2M, G6PD, GAPDH, GUSB, HMBS, HPRT1, PGK1, RPL13A, RPLPO, RPS18, TBP, TFRC, YWHAZ.
